title: Kanni Penmai Poove Lyrics Arundhati
stanzas: <div>Kanni Penmai Poove Lyrics Arundhati

kanni penmai poove
Poove poove poove
men nagaithaan ponne
ponne ponne ponne ponne

mai poosum kangal enna
muththaa maynaave.
sorkkalai oara kannaal
pesum nilaave.

thullathaan thullathaan
nam ullathil sangeethanam.
koyilthaan koyilthaan nam
illamthaan birindhaavanam

pookaal en sevvalli
naanamthaan naalellaam
mogaasthiram.

oodal yaen kondaayo
tholikku sollaayo undhan
manam.

thullathaan thullathaan
nam ullathil sangeethanam.
thullathaan thullathaan nam
illamthaan birindhaavanam

yedhedho vandithaan
pen paarthadhu, ival
ennaththil yaar vandhadhu

ennmpol konjathaan
maaman magal
endru gummaalam
kondaaduthu.

punitha penmaikor
thunai serum podhu
adadaa malaraadho
aasai mella.

nilathil sri lakshmi
paadha poo pattaal
arul serum illaththl
vaibogamthaan.

..kai kanukkai
vandhu thodum naalil
anbe seraadho..

kondaattam kolaagalam
ingu vandhaal paar
sendhoranam.

ullangal ondraaganum
naan kooda naan konja
or tholiye,poovai pooththal
vaa maalaiyida

kanne nee manam en
tholai thoda
thandhen malarthaan
un koondhal thoda.

maatru mangaatha
thangam un nenje.
idhupol naan paartha
pennilliye

thiruve vendum
un nesamthaan vazha
thazhuvum kaithaan
endrum vidamaattaane.

pala kanavo
solla vanna kili
naanam kondaadum.

ondralla oraayiram
nenjukkul niththam varum
ullaasam neeraayiram
enenbaen konda varam
paasam or nirangettu
ponaalum bandhangalthaan
maarumo.

jenmam than oru nooru
kondaalum saagaatha
aanandhamo.

koyilthaan koyilthaan nam
illamthaan birindhaavanam
illamthaan birindhaavanam

enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kanni Penmai Poove from the movie Arundhati is a melodious track that evokes feelings of romance and tranquility. Its soothing rhythm and poetic lyrics create a serene atmosphere, making it perfect for moments of relaxation or romantic occasions. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing, resonating deeply with listeners. Despite the lack of detailed information about the artists, the song's timeless appeal continues to captivate audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kanni Penmai Poove from the movie Arundhati. This song beautifully captures the essence of romance and tranquility, making it a timeless classic. Dive into the soothing rhythms and let the music transport you to a world of love and serenity.
stanzaMeanings: Young girl, flower, flower, flower, smiling like gold, gold, gold, gold, gold.
Eyes with makeup, what a pearl, like a bird. Moon speaking with eyes like words.
There is music in our hearts, jumping with joy. Our home is like a temple, like a paradise.
The flowers are shy, every day is a love spell.
Why are you upset? Tell your friend about your heart.
There is music in our hearts, jumping with joy. Our home is like a paradise.
Something came, the girl saw it, who came into her thoughts?
Like me, she is pampered, celebrating as the groom's daughter.
When the holy girl joins, won't the desire slowly bloom like a flower?
When the feet of Goddess Lakshmi touch the ground, blessings come, prosperity fills the home.
Celebration and festivity have come here, look at the decorations.
Hearts must unite, I too, I pamper a friend, come to adorn the evening with flowers.
Dear, your heart touched mine, I gave you flowers to touch your hair.
Unchanging gold is your heart. I haven't seen a girl like you.
I need your love, it will embrace me forever, never leaving.
Many dreams to tell, the colorful parrot celebrates with modesty.
Not one, but a thousand joys come daily in the heart. Even if love changes color, will bonds change?
Even if life is a hundred years, is there an endless joy?
Our home is like a temple, like a paradise, like a paradise.
